Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3
LWJGL3 desktop backend for FlixelGDX.

This module provides desktop specific launch and configuration utilities for running a FlixelGDX game with libGDX LWJGL3. It is responsible for creating the application, wiring up platform services, and setting runtime flags before a game starts.

See Also:
  • FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
  • FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.alert
     
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.debug
     
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.input
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    FlixelLwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration
    libGDX LWJGL3 application configuration that records the last user-set Lwjgl3WindowListener so FlixelLwjgl3Launcher can wrap it for Flixel window hooks and optional close absorption without reflection.
    FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener
    Outermost GLFW listener that can veto close requests when absorption is enabled.
    FlixelLwjgl3HostIntegration
    Desktop FlixelHostIntegration: freedesktop or Zenity notifications on Linux, osascript on macOS, WinRT toasts via PowerShell on Windows, GLFW window attention, and AWT Taskbar attention where available.
    FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
    Launches the desktop (LWJGL3) version of the Flixel game.
    FlixelLwjgl3Window
    GLFW-backed FlixelWindow for the LWJGL3 backend.
